fields.title: Who Are We ?
fields.content: CBEAS is the one & only college for Biomedical Engineering in Nepal among very few in Asia!

fields.title: Why Study Biomedical Engineering?
fields.content: Biomedical Engineering is the intersection between Engineering and Medicine. It's scope has been rapidly growing, both in developed and developing countries.

fields.title: Our Accomplishment
fields.content: We have successfully conducted two International Conferences on Medical Materials, Devices & Regenerative Medicine on 2008 & 2014.

fields.title: Happy Healthy Learning
fields.content: We take educational rotations to different hospitals and other institutions inside and outside the valley for providing more exposure to the students.

fields.title: Extra Curricular Activities
fields.content: CBEAS supports and encourages participation in sports and other extra curricular skillful activities.

fields.title: Cutting-Edge Research Facilities
fields.feature_text: College of Biomedical Engineering and Applied Sciences offers state-of-the-art labs with the latest technology. Students participate in groundbreaking research, gaining hands-on experience.

fields.title: Expert Faculty and Mentorship
fields.feature_text: Our highly qualified faculty provides personalized guidance and fosters a collaborative learning environment. Students receive top-notch education and support throughout their studies.

fields.title: Comprehensive Curriculum
fields.feature_text: Our curriculum blends theoretical knowledge with practical skills across molecular biology, genetics, bioinformatics, and clinical research. Graduates are well-prepared and versatile professionals.

fields.title: Strong Industry Connections
fields.feature_text: We partner with leading hospitals, research institutions, and biomedical companies, offering students internships, collaborative projects, and job placements to enhance their career prospects.

fields.title: Innovative Learning Methods
fields.feature_text: Using virtual simulations, interactive workshops, and problem-based learning, we foster critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Our innovative approach ensures student engagement and success.

fields.title: Global  Exchange Programs
fields.feature_text: Students can study abroad and participate in international research through our global exchange programs. These opportunities enhance cultural competence  for a global healthcare environment.

fields.full_name: College of Biomedical Engineering and Applied Sciences
fields.about_text:
College of Biomedical Engineering & Applied Sciences (CBEAS), affiliated to the Purbanchal  University, was established in 2005. It is conveniently located at Lalitpur-1, Kupondole, where first-rate education is provided to all students. Equipped with excellent infrastructure and well-furnished classrooms, the college building has all the facilities required for smooth and well planned functioning of the courses. 

This college is the first one among the very few in Asia to provide higher education in Biomedical Engineering for Bachelor level students.

fields.message:
Dear Friends!

As the chairman of this college, I must acknowledge the fact that this college of Biomedical Engineering is one of the best technical colleges of Nepal, already decorated with the award of the best Private Engineering college of Kathmandu, by the Ministry of Education and granted QAA certified Institution by the UGC Nepal.I feel great pride in announcing another fact that because of the excellent result, every year, the demand of admission is increasing alarmingly. In order to meet the demand of the students and guardians, we have shifted the college to a much bigger building with sufficient space. We have already started the expansion of our laboratories and research facilities aiming to make them very useful. We are also introducing the most updated gadgets and equipment to facilitate our labs.As you all know, we are concentrating not only academic field but on research works also and on the overall development of the students. Some of our students have come out with some outstanding research projects and publications. And, as a chairman of this college, I take pride is saying all these and I wish our students best of luck.

Congratulations !!!

Congratulations -BMRIC Team for securing first position in a Sagarmatha Tech Fest program (Hardware Project Demonstration) organized by Sagarmatha Engineering College. !!!

fields.title: First Prize in Hult Prize Event
fields.content:
Congratulations !!!

Congratulations -Bidhya Maharjan, Manisha Khatri and Dikshanta Rana for winning First Prize in Hult Prize Event (On Campus Event of Purbanchal University). Wishing you all for winning Regional level competition which is going to be held in Mumbai, India !!!

fields.title: Accrediation Certificate from UGC
fields.content: CBEAS was awarded with a Accrediation Certificate from UGC amidst a function held at UGC premises on 2073.09.12 (27 Dec,2016).

fields.title: Engineering College Vacancy
fields.content: This is to inform all concerned that there are faculty vacancies available in various departments of our engineering college. We are looking for qualified and experienced candidates to join our esteemed institution. Interested applicants should submit their applications along with their updated CV, copies of academic certificates, and relevant work experience documents by [application deadline date]. Applications can be submitted in person at the college administration office or emailed to [application email address]. For more details regarding the specific departments and qualifications required, please visit the college website or contact the administration office. Join us in fostering excellence in engineering education.

fields.title: Notice for Engineering College Examination
fields.content:
This is to inform all students of the engineering college that the semester examinations for the current academic year will commence on [start date] and conclude on [end date]. The detailed examination timetable, including the subjects, dates, and timings, will be made available on the college notice board and the official college website by [date].

Students are advised to prepare thoroughly and ensure they meet the following requirements:

  1. Hall Tickets: Students must collect their hall tickets from the examination office between [start date for collection] and [end date for collection]. Hall tickets must be carried to each exam as entry without a hall ticket will not be permitted.
  2. Identification: A valid student ID card must be presented along with the hall ticket for verification purposes.
  3. Exam Regulations: Students must adhere to all examination regulations, including the prohibition of any unauthorized materials in the exam hall. Any form of misconduct or malpractice will result in severe disciplinary action.
  4. Reporting Time: Students are required to report to the examination hall at least 30 minutes before the scheduled start time of each exam.
  5. Personal Belongings: Only essential writing instruments and calculators (if permitted) should be brought to the exam hall. All other personal belongings must be left outside the exam hall.

For any queries or clarifications, students may contact the examination office during working hours or email at [examination office email].

We wish all students the best of luck in their upcoming exams.

fields.title: Notice for Engineering College Fee Payment
fields.content: This is to inform all students that the deadline for the payment of tuition and other fees for the upcoming semester is [payment deadline date]. Students are required to complete their fee payments by this date to avoid any late fees or disruptions to their academic schedules. Fee payment can be made at the college finance office during working hours or online through the college's official website. For any queries or assistance regarding the fee payment process, students may contact the finance office or email at [finance office email]. Timely payment is essential for the smooth continuation of your studies.

fields.answer_text:
Biomedical Engineering is the application of principles of engineering to biology and medicine which combines the design and problem solving
techniques of engineering with medical sciences for advanced health care treatment. It covers a wide range of areas from cell and tissue engineering to modeling of
human organs, implantable devices, and diagnostics and therapeutic medical devices and equipment.

fields.question_text: What Is the Scope of Biomedical Courses?
fields.answer_text:
Biomedical Engineers are needed all over the world, whether developed or underdeveloped. These engineers are selling like hot cake in the world market of biomedical field. In Nepal also, they are being employed extensively in hospitals, nursing homes, medical colleges and medical equipment companies. The
government of Nepal is also very much keen on creating and increasing positions in government hospitals. And above all, after completing this course, the graduates can establish their own independent industries thereby creating more jobs.

fields.name: Nelson Basnet
fields.description: My journey at CBEAS has been absolutely amazing and the college faculty as well as administration has supported me and my endeavors throughout. I entered this college 5 years ago with the expectation of being a good Biomedical Engineer and the journey there after has been a memorable one. The college focuses equally on both theory and practical education, organizes regular hospital visits with the aim of providing the knowledge about various modern medical devices. The college even funds for our final year project and has also provided the experience of various international conferences.
